_comment: v2 -- dropped negative classes ('person without X') that shadowed positives in v1 pilot on IMG-20150615-WA0006. Violation logic moved to application code: detect what is present (vest, hat), then for each 'person' bbox, code checks IoU overlap with PPE bbox. Vest prompts switched to color+stripe phrasings that align better with CLIP visual concepts. Order is STABLE -- the integer class id YOLO emits is the index into this list. Edit + re-bake to change.
